particulars.description: Land. See clause 5.1 (fixed charge over real property) of the debenture which creates a fixed charge over the company’s rights, title and interest from time to time in and to all its real property (as defined in the debenture) and all related rights (as defined in the debenture).. Intellectual property. See clause 5.9 (fixed charge over intellectual property) of the debenture which creates a fixed charge of the company’s rights, title and interest from time to time in and to its intellectual property (as defined in the debenture) and all related rights (as defined in the debenture).
